HERO.headline: Austin's Luxury Market,
HERO.sub: You get direct access to me — not an assistant — from the first call through the day we close. 15 years. Every Austin neighborhood. Every price point.

VALUE_PROPS.headline: The difference a real Austin expert makes
VALUE_PROPS.copy: I have lived and worked in this city since 2009. I know which streets flood, which school districts are shifting, and which neighborhoods are quietly becoming Austin's best-kept secrets. That knowledge is what separates a good outcome from a great one.

pillars.title: Local Expertise
pillars.body: Born and raised in Austin. Deep knowledge of every neighborhood, school district, and micro-market — before trends hit the headlines.

pillars.title: Off-Market Access
pillars.body: My network of 400+ Austin agents surfaces listings before they hit the MLS. Sellers receive discreet, pre-qualified offers without public showings.

pillars.title: White-Glove Service
pillars.body: From first showing to closing day, I personally handle every detail — inspections, negotiations, title, and the keys in your hand.

REVIEWS.quote: Marcus sold our home in 8 days for $34,000 over asking. He priced it right, staged it beautifully, and handled everything. Best agent in Austin — full stop.
REVIEWS.name: Sarah M.
REVIEWS.context: Barton Hills · Sold $34k over ask in 8 days

REVIEWS.quote: We were first-time buyers in the most competitive market of our lives. Marcus found us an off-market home before it listed and kept us out of a bidding war. Unreal.
REVIEWS.name: James & Priya T.
REVIEWS.context: Mueller · Off-market purchase, avoided bidding war

REVIEWS.quote: I've bought and sold four homes. Marcus is the most prepared, communicative agent I've ever worked with. Closed our sale in 11 days, $28k over ask.
REVIEWS.name: Daniel R.
REVIEWS.context: Westlake · $28k over ask, 11 days on market

ABOUT.headline: Marcus Cole — Austin's Luxury Market Specialist
ABOUT.body: I've been buying and selling homes in Austin since 2009, through booms, corrections, and everything in between. What I've learned: every transaction is someone's biggest financial moment. I treat it that way. My clients get direct access to me — not an assistant, not a team member — from the first call through the day we close.
credentials: Top 1% Producer, Austin Board of Realtors

MARKET.headline: Know the market before you move
MARKET.sub: Data sourced from the Austin Board of Realtors MLS. Updated monthly.

PROCESS.headline: From hello to closing in three steps

steps.title: Your Consultation
steps.body: We talk through your goals, timeline, and budget in a 30-minute call. No pressure, no commitment. Just clarity on what's possible in today's Austin market.

steps.title: Your Strategy
steps.body: I build a custom pricing strategy or buyer search plan tailored to your specific neighborhood, timeline, and non-negotiables.

steps.title: Your Close
steps.body: You walk away with the best possible outcome. I handle every detail from offer negotiation to signing day — and hand you the keys.

LEAD_FORM.headline: Find out what your Austin home is worth — today.
LEAD_FORM.body: I'll pull a custom comparative market analysis (CMA) based on recent sales within half a mile of your address. It takes 24 hours. It's completely free. And it comes with no obligation to list.
LEAD_FORM.successMessage: We'll be in touch within 24 hours. — Marcus

items.q: How much is my Austin home worth right now?
items.a: Austin home values shift month to month based on inventory, interest rates, and neighborhood demand. I'll pull a custom comparative market analysis using recent sales within half a mile of your address — it takes 24 hours and is completely free.

items.q: How long does it take to sell a home in Austin?
items.a: My listings sell in an average of 11 days. The biggest factor is pricing strategy — homes priced correctly consistently attract multiple offers in the first week. I'll show you exactly where your home sits in today's market.

items.q: Do I need a buyer's agent to purchase a home in Austin?
items.a: In Texas, sellers typically cover the buyer agent commission. Working with me as your buyer's agent costs you nothing out of pocket and puts a skilled negotiator in your corner on the largest purchase of your life.

items.q: What neighborhoods do you work in?
items.a: I cover all of Austin — Barton Hills, Westlake, Mueller, Hyde Park, Tarrytown, Circle C Ranch, South Congress, and East Austin. I also serve surrounding suburbs including Cedar Park, Round Rock, Pflugerville, and Dripping Springs.

items.q: What's the difference between listing with you vs. a large team or brokerage?
items.a: With a large team, you often meet the listing agent once and then hand off to an assistant. With me, you get me — personally — for every call, showing, negotiation, and issue that comes up.
